title: Colored Bricks Mod
description: Colored Bricks: many different variants of each bricks for blocks, stairs, slabs, walls, fence & fence gates. 16+ new colors for your Minecraft buildings and decorations
body:
### Colored Bricks | [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/colored-bricks-mod/versions)
### 


Mod adds over **15+** types of colored bricks, as well as their variations: stairs, walls, fences, fence gates, half-blocks, buttons, pressure plates & more to Minecraft with custom craft & painting system


![All Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bd286c77c0c14af2d2a6a2a72a1442f7d6246a8.png)

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2768fdc8aeb6dfbbaeeaae6ef534ad47622181.png)


**[MACAN Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/macan-music-discs/changelog)**
